findings.text: Task TASK-003A is a human intervention step to retrieve Azure Document Intelligence credentials. No automated action possible.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Credential Retrieval Process

1. Identify Azure subscription and Document Intelligence resource.
2. Navigate to Azure portal > Resource > Keys and Endpoint.
3. Copy key1 or key2 and endpoint URL.
4. Store securely in Atticus secrets manager.
5. Confirm credentials are valid by testing a simple OCR call.
6. Document the resource name, endpoint, and key identifier (not the key itself) in this artifact.
proposed_artifacts.title: Azure Document Intelligence Credential Retrieval Guide

summary: Task requires human retrieval of Azure Document Intelligence credentials. No source materials or artifacts provided. No legal analysis possible. Proposed task to document credential retrieval process.

uncertainties.text: No source materials or artifacts provided; cannot verify credential status or availability.
